ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ARENALES, FLORA M AN INDIVIDUAL

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S MOTION THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY 7, 2013 AT 9:00 AM ON THE DISCOVERY CALENDAR TO GIVE CACH, LLC THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. CACH, LLC MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN APRIL 29, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Assigned To Arbitration On Jun-17-13

Notice Of Motion That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S Motion that Matters in Request for Admissions Be Deemed Admitted is Off calendar. Cach, LLC has failed to provide courtesy copies of its moving papers as instructed by the Court in the order issued on April 29, 2013. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Continued To May-07-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S MOTION THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED is continued on the court's own motion to May 7, 2013 at 9:00 am on the discovery calendar to give Cach, LLC the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Cach, LLC must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 29, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
